articles.description: Luis Enrique's expertise at rebuilding a culture as well as a football team means Arsenal will confront the complete package when they meet holders Paris St-Germain in the Champions League final.
articles.title: Champions League: Why Paris St-Germain pose ultimate test for Arsenal in Budapest final

articles.description: With Paris St-Germain waiting in the Champions League final, will Arsenal withstand the firepower of one of Europe's most formidable attacks and lift the trophy for the first time on 30 May?
articles.title: Champions League final: Why resolute Arsenal will believe prolific PSG can be beaten

articles.description: It's been a difficult second season for Kylian Mbappe at Real Madrid. What's gone wrong?
articles.title: Kylian Mbappe: Injury row, yacht trip & petition - what's going on with Real Madrid striker?

articles.description: Neymar apologises to his Santos team-mate Robinho Jr for slapping the teenager during a training session on Sunday, saying he "crossed the line".
articles.title: Neymar: Brazil forward apologises to Santos team-mate Robinho Jr for slapping him

articles.description: Manchester City have won a first Women's Super League title in 10 years - but how did they achieve it?
articles.title: Women's Super League: How Manchester City clinched a first title in 10 years

articles.description: Kyle Jamieson and Will O'Rourke return after injuries to bolster a strong New Zealand pace attack for next month's Test series in England and one-off Test against Ireland.
articles.title: England v New Zealand: Kyle Jamieson & Will O'Rourke bolster Black Caps' pace attack

articles.description: The FC Andorra owner became involved in an argument after his side's 1-0 defeat by Albacete in the second division.
articles.title: Gerard Pique: FC Andorra owner banned for two months after argument with referee

articles.description: Bayern Munich players, coaching staff and fans at the Allianz Arena were in disbelief after they were denied a penalty for a handball by Joao Neves in their semi-final second leg against Paris St-Germain.
articles.title: Why was Joao Neves handball against Bayern Munich not a penalty?

articles.description: The Mexican Football Federation threatens to drop players from the country's World Cup squad if they fail to report for a training camp this week.
articles.title: World Cup 2026: Mexico Football Federation threatens to drop players over training camp row

articles.description: Manchester City manager Andree Jeglertz says he "had a feeling from the beginning" that his side would win the Women's Super League title this year, with the club's ambition, quality and hunger the key.
articles.title: Man City WSL title: 'I had a feeling', says boss Andree Jeglertz
